mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO test_result_partitioned (type, source_id, large_category, medium_category, small_category, product_name, quantity, unit_price, total, event_date) SELECT #{type}, sales.id, category.large_category, category.medium_category, category.small_category, product.product_name, sales.quantity, sales.unit_price, sales.product_total, sales.order_date FROM new_sales_data sales JOIN new_product_info product ON product.id = sales.product_id JOIN new_category category ON category.id = product.category_id WHERE sales.order_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to}

INSERT IGNORE INTO test_result_partitioned (type, source_id, large_category, medium_category, small_category, product_name, quantity, unit_price, total, event_date) SELECT #{type}, delivery.id, category.large_category, category.medium_category, category.small_category, delivery.order_number, delivery.shipping_count, delivery.unit_price, delivery.total_delivery_fee, delivery.order_date FROM new_delivery_fee delivery JOIN new_category category ON category.id = delivery.category_id WHERE delivery.category_id = 63 AND delivery.total_delivery_fee > 0 AND delivery.order_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to}
